zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Lindsay Steedman於1604年出生在英國蘇格蘭金洛-爾金洛斯時，她的父親William Steidman27歲，母親Katherine Wilson32歲。她於1618年4月18日與James Rankin在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1659年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Lindsay Steedman于1604年出生在英国苏格兰金洛-爾金洛斯时，她的父亲William Steidman27岁，母亲Katherine Wilson32岁。她于1618年4月18日与James Rankin在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1659年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Steedman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Steadman
meanings: occupational or topographic name from Middle English stede ‘place, farm, estate’ (Old English stede) + -man, used for someone who lived or worked on a farm, or who lived at a place so named. Compare Stead .
occupational name for someone who worked with horses, from Middle English sted(e) ‘horse, stallion’ (Old English steda) + -man. Compare Steed .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, originally borne by Sir Walter de Lindesay , one of the retainers of King David I of Scotland ( 1084–1153 ), who took the name to Scotland from Lindsey in Lincolnshire. The place name is first recorded in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln. To this was later added Old English eg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. As a given name Lindsay was at first used for boys, and in Scotland and Australia it remains in occasional use as a male name, but elsewhere it is now used for girls.

variants.name: Linzi
meanings: Fanciful respelling of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey .

variants.name: Linsy
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, originally borne by Sir Walter de Lindesay , one of the retainers of King David I of Scotland ( 1084–1153 ), who took the name to Scotland from Lindsey in Lincolnshire. The place name is first recorded in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln. To this was later added Old English eg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. As a given name Lindsay was at first used for boys, and in Scotland and Australia it remains in occasional use as a male name, but elsewhere it is now used for girls.

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Lindsay Steedman was born in 1604, in Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Steidman, was 27 and her mother, Katherine Wilson, was 32. She married James Rankin on 18 April 1618, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1659, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Lindsay Steedman est née en 1604, à Kinross, Kinross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Steidman, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Katherine Wilson, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé James Rankin le 18 avril 1618, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1659, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Lindsay Steedman 1604 in Kinross, Kinross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Steidman 27 und ihre Mutter Katherine Wilson 32. Sie hat am 18. April 1618 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom James Rankin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1659 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Lindsay Steedman è nata il nel 1604 nel Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Steidman, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Katherine Wilson, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato James Rankin il 18 aprile 1618, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1659, nel Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Lindsay Steedmanが1604年にイギリススコットランドキンロス-シュアイアキンロスで生まれた時，父William Steidmanは27歳，母Katherine Wilsonは32歳であった。1618年4月18日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでJames Rankinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1659年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Lindsay Steedman(이)가 1604년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨로스-실르 킨로스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Steidman(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Wilson(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1618년 4월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 James Rankin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1659년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Lindsay Steedman nasceu em 1604, em Kinross, Kinross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Steidman, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Wilson, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com James Rankin em 18 de abril de 1618, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1659, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Lindsay Steedman родилась в 1604 г. в местности кинросс, кинросс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Steidman было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wilson, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Rankin 18 апреля 1618 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1659 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion Lindsay Steedman nació en 1604, en Kinross, Kinross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Steidman, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Katherine Wilson, tenía 32 años. Se casó con James Rankin el 18 de abril de 1618, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1659, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
